name: Shrimp Scampi/Ritz Crackers.
recipeInstructions:
1. Take the shrimp and split them through the shell as you would a lobster tail, splitting them on the rounded part of the shell.
2. Do not remove the shell. After they have been split, pull them so that the meat is separated from the shell and then lay them back in the shell.
3. Only pull until you reach the tail. Remember, do not remove the shrimp from the shell.
4. Lay all of the opened shrimp on a baking pan and brush with a mixture of fresh garlic and butter.
5. Take a tube of Ritz crackers and squeeze them like an accordian until they are crushed.
6. Sprinkle the crushed crackers on the buttered shrimp.
7. Pour additional garlic and butter over the shrimp again.
8. Place the pan in a 400°F (200°C) oven and bake until the crumbs start to brown.
9. Take from the oven and enjoy.
Please remind your guests that the shrimp are still in their shells and should be lifted out gently for great results, similar to lobster tails with great results.
